title: Modlingo's Perfect Minecraft
description: Enhancing the visuals, exploration and progression of Minecraft in a vanilla-friendly way!
body:
# Modlingo's Perfect Minecraft

!['Modlingo's Perfect Minecraft'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/THBUR6h9/images/0f5a30096f3278ab2f3623f650e41f9405055f3e.png)
---

### Welcome to my perfect version of Minecraft!
This modpack looks to improve on:
- Visuals 🎨
- Exploration 🏔️
- Progression ⚔️
## Visuals
!['Modlingo's Perfect Minecraft Visuals'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/THBUR6h9/images/81e05ce89a88992d77e762f970187ce88c8d5ee8.png)

**Visual Mods:**
- Advancement Placques
- Better Third Person
- Blur
- Clean Tooltips
- Explosive Enhancement
- Iris
- Eating Animation
- Detail Armor Bar
- Lamb Dynamic Lights
- Legendary Tooltips
- Not Enough Animation
- Traveler's Titles
- Visuality
- Wavey Capes

## Exploration
!['Modlingo's Perfect Minecraft'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/THBUR6h9/images/1e5c5246af3b40b0e1b45f9388af7a7a2160d74d.png)

**Exploration Mods:**
- Tectonic
- Wilder Wilds
- Yung's Catalog
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages

## Progression
!['Modlingo's Perfect Minecraft'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/THBUR6h9/images/98315906067116640b8f6951513a9b359f469305.png)

**Progression Mods:**
- End Remastered
- Better Archeology
- Better Trims
- Ender Dragon Fight Remastered
- Gaurding
---

This mod also includes a variety of QOL mods to boost performance. 
I hope you enjoy this pack!

I do not own any of these mods. 

Visual Traveler's Titles: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-travelers-titles
